Class ListenerAdapter

java.lang.Object
dev.despical.tntrun.event.ListenerAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
ArenaSignEvents, CommandBlockEvents, GameEvents, GameItemEvents, GeneralEvents
public abstract class ListenerAdapter extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
